race.comment: Very even race with a host of win chances. ARTFUL MAXIMUS (1) has been knocking on the door and was a fair fifth over a bit further a week ago. Quick back-up and back in trip. Looks hard to hold out. LIVE FOREVER (3) wound up strongly only to just miss last start over 1200m at Strathalbyn. Close to a win and capable of taking this out. FOREVER A DIAMOND (9) was poorly away and bustled forward, racing on speed before fading to finish tenth, beaten 7 lengths, over 1200m at Murray Bridge. Well placed and worth another chance. OR AM I (10) is returning from a spell of 11 weeks. Finished eighth at Cranbourne over 1200m at the first run last prep. Now with a new trainer Jessica Tzaferis and a bold performance is expected on best figures. PLATINO (5) ran well on debut to place and can only be further improved.
